data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Investigation complete. Root cause: Taxonomy #11 (Positional Bias) + #6 (Termination Awareness Failure). ORCHESTRATOR_RESUME is pre-call static text buried in 76k context. Implementation-plan rich summary table dominates recency window at tool-return. The conditional 'Only halt if invoked interactively' framing implies halting is a valid default. Fix: (1) add unconditional continuation signal as absolute last output of implementation-plan, (2) remove conditional halt language.
